examples.title: Simple Paxos Proposer
examples.code:
PROCEDURE Proposer(proposalNumber, proposedValue)
BEGIN
 // Phase 1: Prepare
 maxPromised = proposalNumber
 FOR each acceptor IN acceptors DO
 SEND Prepare(proposalNumber) TO acceptor
 END FOR
 
 // Wait for majority promises
 promises = RECEIVE FROM majority
 
 // Phase 2: Accept
 IF maxPromised has existing value THEN
 valueToPropose = existingValue
 ELSE
 valueToPropose = proposedValue
 END IF
 
 FOR each acceptor IN acceptors DO
 SEND Accept(proposalNumber, valueToPropose) TO acceptor
 END FOR
 
 // Check if accepted by majority
 accepts = RECEIVE FROM majority
 IF size(accepts) >= majority THEN
 VALUE_CHOSEN = valueToPropose
 NOTIFY learners
 END IF
END
examples.explanation: The proposer initiates Paxos by sending Prepare messages with a proposal number. It collects promises from majority of acceptors, then sends Accept messages with the value. If majority accepts, the value is chosen.

examples.title: Two-Phase Commit Coordinator
examples.description: 2PC coordinator protocol for distributed transaction commitment
examples.code:
PROCEDURE Coordinator(transaction)
BEGIN
 // Phase 1: Prepare
 FOR each participant IN participants DO
 SEND Prepare(transaction) TO participant
 END FOR
 
 votes = RECEIVE FROM all participants
 
 // Phase 2: Decision
 allVotedYes = TRUE
 FOR each vote IN votes DO
 IF vote == NO THEN
 allVotedYes = FALSE
 BREAK
 END IF
 END FOR
 
 IF allVotedYes THEN
 FOR each participant IN participants DO
 SEND Commit(transaction) TO participant
 END FOR
 ELSE
 FOR each participant IN participants DO
 SEND Abort(transaction) TO participant
 END FOR
 END IF
END
examples.explanation: The coordinator collects prepare votes from all participants. If all vote YES, it sends COMMIT; otherwise sends ABORT to all. If coordinator fails before sending decision, participants may block.

examples.title: Reliable Multicast Receiver
examples.description: Receiver side reliable multicast with agreement property
examples.explanation: The receiver handles duplicates, sends acknowledgments, and delivers messages when agreement is reached or timeout occurs. This implements the agreement property of reliable multicast.
